ChatDash, LLC
ChatDash is a white-labeled AI assistant dashboard solution tailor-made for agencies, enabling them to provide clients with a customizable, brandable interface for managing their own Knowledge Bases. This platform enhances the value agencies offer by saving them time on Knowledge Base maintenance and allowing for higher ticket pricing for their AI chatbot services. With plans catering to various agency sizes, from small startups to established firms, ChatDash combines full Voiceflow and OpenAI Assistant API integrations with dedicated support, offering a premium, branded client experience across the board.

What's happening?

View feed
Jitesh🔺onReplyGain· 2m

Launch Offer: Up to $60/mo OFF for 6 months. Claim offer → Replygain.com

Gopal DasonQuickClip· 2h

You grab your phone to copy a code, then walk to your laptop and paste. QuickClip makes that instant instead of annoying. Give it a shot.

Md. Meher UllahonQuickMemorial· 2h

TrustMRR does more than just sell your product—they challenge your assumptions. A buyer recently threw me a curveball: "Have you considered B2B for QuickMemorial?" I hadn't. But guess what? I'm now all-in on the B2B side. Shifting my focus to help funeral homes, crematoriums, and memorial planners ("brokers") seamlessly manage memorials for their clients. Sometimes the best product roadmaps come from the most unexpected conversations. Good to be here!

RajonAudio Tools - Video to Mp3· 9h

Listed for sale; launched 2 weeks ago $76 MRR | $56 Revenue | No backend costs | 100% profit

Gopal DasonQuickClip· 9h

You copy a link on your phone and it's already waiting on your laptop. QuickClip handles that in real time. Give it a try.

Tommy PhamonPain Base· 10h

I stopped brainstorming SaaS ideas. Now I just read what people are complaining about. I pull complaints from Reddit and X. When 40 people describe the same problem and nobody solves it, I build it. Painbase scores each complaint by severity and gap. I sort by gap score first.

Jacob CounsellonLaunchChair· 16h

LaunchChair now has a full agent loop API / MCP so you can have Claude or Codex build a market informed SaaS that doesn’t suck without writing a single prompt. Every LaunchChair build also starts with an agent ready boilerplate worth $500, this boilerplate has auth, admin, blog, agents.md / design.md, hooks for Stripe / Resend / PostHog, PWA architecture, hardcore security, and everything you need for great SEO right out of the gate. launchchair.io

Mourad EL BAGHDADIonMedra· 18h

Medra V2 is now live—it’s the go-to AI for students, the best tool for reviewing, studying, writing, and solving problems!

Gopal DasonQuickClip· 21h

You copy a tracking number on your phone and need it on your laptop. QuickClip makes the paste instant. Give it a shot.

WNY DesignonL'accélérateur digital· 21h

Native French-language product for Francophone markets
